Guest Lecture: Entrepreneurship & Startups
Date: 18 May 2026
Time: 10:00 AM – 12:30 PM
Venue: Seminar Hall - Block B
Guest Speaker: Industry Startup Founder
Maximum Participants: 120
Registration Deadline: 15 May 2026
About the Guest Lecture:

This guest lecture focuses on entrepreneurship development and startup culture in India. The invited industry expert will share real-life experiences, challenges faced while building a startup, funding opportunities, business strategies, and key lessons for aspiring entrepreneurs. Students will gain practical insights on how to transform innovative ideas into successful ventures.
Event Rules:

• Participants must carry their college ID card.
• Prior registration is mandatory.
• Participants should reach the venue 15 minutes early.
• Maintain discipline and active participation during the session.
